name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: Guess who's in Ohio again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Hillary Clinton is scheduled to be in Ohio again today - no doubt intending to attack Gov. John Kasich's strong conservative record.

[**Peter, let's show Gov. Kasich that we have his back!**](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30295575:29035272447:m:1:958431888:B0D24A86773A4C680FA73AEFBD2E0438:r)

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30295576:29035272447:m:1:958431888:B0D24A86773A4C680FA73AEFBD2E0438:r)

**So why is Hillary on the attack?

**
**She knows she can 't win the White House without winning Ohio** \- and she can't win Ohio against Gov. John Kasich.

According to a recent poll, Gov. Kasich is the ONLY Republican candidate who is defeating her in New Hampshire right now. In another poll, Gov. Kasich has a 61% approval rating in Ohio.

While Hillary continues to throw mud at other candidates, Gov. John Kasich is sharing a positive vision for the future of our great country.

**[Let's show our support and ensure that Hillary is defeated!

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30295575:29035272447:m:1:958431888:B0D24A86773A4C680FA73AEFBD2E0438:r)**
**Watch this short video of Gov. Kasich's message:**
**[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30295577:29035272447:m:1:958431888:B0D24A86773A4C680FA73AEFBD2E0438:r)**

With your help, we can win the primary, go on to defeat Hillary and then work together to lift America. [Please consider chipping in today](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30295575:29035272447:m:1:958431888:B0D24A86773A4C680FA73AEFBD2E0438:r).

Thank you.

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30295576:29035272447:m:1:958431888:B0D24A86773A4C680FA73AEFBD2E0438:r)
Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Chris Christie
subject: Debate prep question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter - The next debate is less than a week away. As I prepare to talk about my thoughts and ideas for getting this country back on track, I'm aware that a number of very important issues didn't get the air time they deserved during the first debate.

Which is why I'm asking for your help. **[Let me know which issues you think should get more air time during the second debate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43846903:19215343107:m:1:1516426255:35F26252DCE40C4B8659C48B63E36657:r)** My entire campaign has been about listening and understanding what concerns Americans most. Hearing from you first-hand always makes me better as a candidate and stronger as a leader.
> So, whether I get to talk about them when answering a question, or in my closing remarks, I want your feedback on the issues you want me to address.
>
Then, tune in to watch on debate night and follow along on social media. Today, it's about debate prep but **[I hope you'll continue to let me know which issues are important to you so we can continue to talk about real solutions.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43846903:19215343107:m:1:1516426255:35F26252DCE40C4B8659C48B63E36657:r)** I would greatly appreciate your feedback.
Chris
****

****
****
****

---
| |
---|---|---
| | Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc.
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: 10 reasons why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

President Obama's Iran deal is dangerous and should be
stopped, but if he does get it through, we need the next
president to undo it as soon as he takes office. And that's
exactly what I'll do.

I've been talking about my plan for how to do that, and
how to put the pressure back on Iran, for some time. But why is
it so important to undo the deal? Why is it simply too dangerous
for the U.S. to tolerate?

I've laid out ten reasons on my website that explain
precisely why we can't keep this deal.

A secret side agreement, for instance, lets Iran do its
own inspecting of a military facility, preventing us from finding
out what work they did there. Without that information, how can
we be sure Iran won't cheat again?

The deal lifts sanctions on trade in conventional weapons
to Iran in five years, and sanctions on transfers of ballistic
missile technology in eight.

It will give Iran tens of billions of dollars in cash
without waiting for real evidence of cooperation. The deal gives
up all our leverage over a terrorist regime that wants to
obliterate us and our allies, especially Israel.

I could go on. Read more about it here.

I hope you'll join me in opposing the deal, and if it
goes through, in undoing it and reimposing sanctions on Iran.

Sincerely,

Marco Rubio

DONATE

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:
https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe: https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Check out what Sarah Palin said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
_**[Rand Paul] is an outsider in a very good and healthy way. I certainly have a lot of respect for him for his courage in going rogue, and being that outsider and effecting positive change**. _

\- Sarah Palin, Women Betrayed Rally, 9/10/15
Fellow Conservative:

Today I had the honor of headlining Students for Life and Pro-Life Future's Women Betrayed Rally.

Sarah Palin attended the event and we both agreed it was ridiculous there is anyone in Congress who would defend Planned Parenthood.

I took a stand that no budget passed by Congress should include one cent for an abortion mill that chops up unborn babies and sells their organs like scrap.

**[Will you add your name to the growing chorus of Americans demanding Congress defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309172:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, the establishment politicians in both parties are already making excuses.

But the truth of the matter is the Democrats don't have the votes to fund Planned Parenthood.

We should force the Democrats to explain their extremist position that an organization that dissects babies to harvest their organs should hold the budget hostage.

Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton and the rest of the Democrat Party can explain to the American people why they shut down the government.

This is going to require real leadership in Washington.

And I'm willing to spearhead this fight...

...Even if it means taking on members of my own party!

That's ok.

I've always stood for life above all else.

My record is proof that I have walked the walk in defending the unborn.

I have twice introduced the Life at Conception Act to end abortion on demand in America.

And I've earned a lifetime 100% rating from National Right to Life.

So when I say Congress must not pass a budget that funds Planned Parenthood, I'm not selling campaign slogans.

I'm promising my willingness to lead.

I hope you will take a few moments to **[watch my speech](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309172:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)** from the Women Betrayed Rally.

And after you watch the video, **[please sign your"Defund Planned Parenthoood" petition and chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309172:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309173:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309174:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309175:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309176:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309172:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309177:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309178:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30309179:29047950603:m:1:879035888:716BE0FD5A54F5DC8FB8B54F77A051A4:r)

name: Jeff Weaver, Official Bernie 2016
subject: [Poll Alert] We're ahead in Iowa
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters --
When we entered this race, people thought there was no way we could compete in New Hampshire.
Now we're ahead in New Hampshire: Bernie Sanders has 41%, while Hillary Clinton has 32%.
Then people said there was no way we could win Iowa. Now we're ahead there, too, according to a new poll released just this morning:
**Iowa Democratic Caucus Poll**
Bernie Sanders: 41%
Hillary Clinton: 40%
Now our opponents claim to be building an "electoral firewall" in other states across the country. Let's show them the prairie fire we are starting in Iowa can't be stopped.
[**People should not underestimate us. Your $3 contribution to our campaign will help us compete and win in all 50 states.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220f/43f17890/5b9e0980/621ce250/1152304541/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iowa-poll?refcode=em150910iowa")
Our successes in these polls are a clear indication that Bernie's message is resonating with voters. And the more people hear about Bernie's vision of economic, racial and social justice, the more our support grows. But we need your help to keep spreading the word.
We don't have any Super PACs or billionaires. This campaign is being funded by hundreds of thousands of Americans. Your support is not only appreciated, it is essential to the success of this campaign.
Your contribution will allow us to invest in people, helping them organize their communities, and build an organization of people who are empowered to create change all across the country.
The organization we're building will win Iowa, will win New Hampshire, will win the Democratic nomination for president, will win the White House, and that, most importantly, will usher in the political revolution that our country so desperately needs.
[**Your $3 contribution will help us win. Please make a contribution to our campaign today.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220f/43f17890/5b9e0980/621ce250/1152304541/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iowa-poll?refcode=em150910iowa")
Feel the Bern,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220f/43f17890/5b9e0980/621ce250/1152304541/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/iowa-poll?refcode=em150910iowa")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220f/43f17890/5b9e0980/621ce251/1152304541/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220f/43f17890/5b9e0980/621ce25e/1152304541/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220f/43f17890/5b9e0980/621ce25f/1152304541/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb220f/43f17890/5b9e0980/621ce25c/1152304541/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Scott Walker
subject: 50 yard line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Walker Inc
body:
Peter, Have you ever attended a NFL Monday Night Football game? Well, now is your chance. On Monday, September 28 Wisconsin's own Green Bay Packers will be playing the Chiefs at historic Lambeau Field and I want you to be there with me.
| [](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjM0NzU4ODcS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQxMDM4NTk2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Peter, Have you ever attended a NFL Monday Night Football game? Well, now is your chance. On Monday, September 28 Wisconsin's own Green Bay Packers will be playing the Chiefs at historic Lambeau Field and I want you to be there with me. There is no better place to catch the excitement of a professional football game and no more electric crowd than what you'll encounter at Lambeau Field. **_Our campaign is going to provide round trip transportation for you and a friend to Wisconsin for the game and give you two tickets on the 50 yard line._** [Go ahead and chip in $4 or more for you and a friend to be automatically entered for the tickets.](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM0NzU4ODcS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQxMDM4NTk2S0&mt=1&rt=0) I look forward to meeting you at Lambeau, Peter. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Central Daylight Time on September 22, 2015. One (1) winner will receive two (2) tickets, one (1) night stay for two (2) and transportation for two (2) to the NFL's Monday Night Football game between the Green Bay Packers and the Kansas City Chiefs on September 28, 2015. The approximate total retail value of the trip is $2,000. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](http://links.connectivistmedia.mkt7175.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM0NzU4ODcS1&r=MTIyNzQ5MzU4NDU1S0&b=0&j=NjQxMDM4NTk2S0&mt=1&rt=0). The Sponsor is Scott Walker Inc., PO Box 620590, Middleton, WI 53562.
clean_body: Peter, Have you ever attended a NFL Monday Night Football game? Well, now is your chance. On Monday, September 28 Wisconsin's own Green Bay Packers will be playing the Chiefs at historic Lambeau Field and I want you to be there with me. | Peter, Have you ever attended a NFL Monday Night Football game? Well, now is your chance. On Monday, September 28 Wisconsin's own Green Bay Packers will be playing the Chiefs at historic Lambeau Field and I want you to be there with me. There is no better place to catch the excitement of a professional football game and no more electric crowd than what you'll encounter at Lambeau Field. Our campaign is going to provide round trip transportation for you and a friend to Wisconsin for the game and give you two tickets on the 50 yard line. I look forward to meeting you at Lambeau, Peter. Scott Walker | | Paid for by Scott Walker Inc. Contributions or gifts to Scott Walker Inc. are not tax deductible.

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Join Bernie for a rally in Manassas, VA
body:
#
Friend -
Bernie's campaign for president has been generating big excitement across the country, and now he is coming to Virginia for a rally in Manassas.
Would you like to come hear Bernie speak about taking on the billionaire class and standing up for working families?
**Manassas Rally with Bernie Sanders
Monday, September 14**
Gates open at 6:00pm
Program starts at 8:00pm

Prince William County Fairgrounds
10624 Dumfries Road
Manassas, VA 20112
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2273/43f17890/5bf1f1e0/621ce1b0/3909252151/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4j4y7")
[**Click here to RSVP »**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2273/43f17890/5bf1f1e0/621ce1b0/3909252151/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/rally/4j4y7")
We can't wait to see you there!
\- Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2273/43f17890/5bf1f1e0/621ce1b1/3909252151/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2273/43f17890/5bf1f1e0/621ce1be/3909252151/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2273/43f17890/5bf1f1e0/621ce1bf/3909252151/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2273/43f17890/5bf1f1e0/621ce1bc/3909252151/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Ted Cruz's latest move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

We've been here before. Once again, Ted Cruz and his extremist allies in Congress have launched an irresponsible attack on women's rights and access to health care.

Cruz and his cronies are actually threatening to shut down the government in order to defund Planned Parenthood. It's political brinkmanship plain and simple, and I've had enough.

[**If you have too, join me to tell Ted Cruz and his cronies to stop their reckless shutdown games.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f1f/70cdc2ba/47af0109/39589fc/2678732461/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2IiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/no-more-shutdowns?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&firstname=&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+If+you+have+too+join+me+to+tell+Ted+Cruz&utm_campaign=em091015&source=em091015")

Two years ago, when Cruz caused a shutdown in a misguided attempt to defund the Affordable Care Act, it cost our economy over $24 billion. We can't afford to let that happen again.

**That 's why today I introduced legislation to prevent a shutdown that gives Republicans a choice: come to the table and work for a solution or get out of the way.**

This is not a drill: extremists in Congress have shown us their playbook, and I'm going to need your voice this time to stop their reckless plans.

**[Add your name today to help put an end to this nonsense. Tell Republicans: NO MORE SHUTDOWNS!>>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f1f/70cdc2ba/47af0109/39589f3/2678732461/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2IiwiSlNWbWFYSnpkRzVoYldVbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZzWVhOMGJtRnRaU1VsIjoiIn0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/no-more-shutdowns?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&firstname=&lastname=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+today+to+help+put+an+end+t&utm_campaign=em091015&source=em091015")**

Thanks for standing with me. Together we'll send a message to Ted Cruz, Mitch McConnell and John Boehner that we won't stand for another government shutdown.

Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f1f/70cdc2ba/47af0109/3958986/2678732461/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em091015&source=em091015") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Team Murphy
subject: BREAKING: The Kochs Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

The Koch Brothers-funded group Americans for Prosperity just published an op-ed in the _Sun Sentinel_ _**attacking Patrick for being AGAINST Citizens United.**_ That's the same Koch Brothers who support _Citizens United_ because they want to use unaccountable millions to buy themselves elections.

We have to fight back against every attack. For that, we need resources. We've started our Rapid Response Fund for moments exactly like this. Right now, we need $3,000. [**Will you step up right now?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e4/738133e4/3af2d317/7f8b298c/2433028831/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150910pm?refcode=pme150910pm_m&recurring=true")

This is just the beginning. The Kochs will use their money (funded by _Citizens United)_ to rip Patrick down with their lies from now until the election. They know if Patrick wins, he will work tirelessly to save our democracy from their corrupting influence -- that means ending _Citizens United_.

We can't let their lies win because we didn't have the strength to fight back when it mattered -- like right now. [**Please, we need your support right now more than ever.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e4/738133e4/3af2d317/7f8b298c/2433028831/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150910pm?refcode=pme150910pm_m&recurring=true")

Thanks for your support,

\-- Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20e4/738133e4/3af2d317/7f8b298d/2433028831/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
